description: Negative tests verifying absence of spurious inferences; run with the full ontology (gender-specific)

neg-fiona-no-nibling.description: fiona's only sibling is helen who has no children, so fiona hasNibling must be empty.

neg-zela-no-sibling.description: zela's only parents are abel and ada, each of whom has only one child (zela); she has no siblings.

neg-adam-no-stepchild.description: adam and eva share all their children; no step-child should be derived for adam.

neg-helen-no-stepparent.description: helen is a biological child of both azura and antoine; she should have no step-parent.

hasUncle-via-inlaw.description: carl is david's uncle via hasNiblingInLaw (carl hasSpouse carol; carol hasSibling bob; bob hasChild david). Extended hasUncleAunt includes in-law relationships.

neg-bob-carol-not-halfsibling.description: bob and carol share parent azura and are declared twins. hasHalfSibling excludes twin pairs via FILTER NOT EXISTS { hasTwin }.

neg-fiona-helen-not-stepsibling.description: fiona and helen share biological father antoine; they are half-siblings. hasStepSibling filters out pairs already related via hasSibling or hasHalfSibling.

neg-antoine-no-stepdaughter-helen.description: helen is antoine's biological daughter (antoine hasChild helen). hasStepChild uses FILTER NOT EXISTS to exclude biological children.

neg-david-no-uncle-abel.description: abel is david's great-uncle (azura's brother, and azura is bob's mother, bob is david's father). hasUncleAunt is limited to one generation up; no path places abel as david's uncle.

neg-hasSibling-irreflexive.description: Guards against any OWL-RL loopback that would make a person their own sibling.
